name: Ad Speedup - Skip Video Ads 16X Faster
description: Automatically speed-up ads 16X on videos. 100% Free. Skip ads automatically. Hide ad banner. Clicks Skip add button automatically.

combination_warnings.name: URL Harvesting Pattern
combination_warnings.description: Can harvest visited URLs via tabs API and store them for later exfiltration

combination_warnings.name: Screen Capture Capability
combination_warnings.description: Can capture screenshots of any website via captureVisibleTab API

findings.name: Default CSP (MV3 strict)
findings.description: Using MV3 default CSP which blocks unsafe-eval.

store_metadata.name: Ad Speedup - Skip Video Ads 16X Faster

web_accessible_resources.description: Access to all subdomains of youtube.com (all pages)

risk_factors: Has <all_urls> access - can read/modify ALL websites

virustotal_file_results.message: File hash not found in VirusTotal database

correlations.name: Credential Harvester
correlations.description: Extension monitors user input (passwords, keystrokes, form data) and has network capabilities to exfiltrate captured credentials.
correlations.evidence: Token theft, Input monitoring + network exfiltration capability

correlations.name: Remote Code Execution Risk
correlations.description: Extension uses dynamic code execution with network access on all URLs. Remote code can be fetched and executed on any page.

correlations.name: Device Fingerprint Collector
correlations.description: Extension collects device fingerprint data (canvas, WebGL, audio, fonts, IP) and has network exfiltration capability. Device fingerprinting enables cross-site user tracking.

attack_chain.capability: Harvests data via: Input monitoring, Token theft
Sends data externally via: Network request

attack_narrative.impact_summary: PARTIAL ATTACK CAPABILITY: Multiple components of a data theft pipeline detected. Manual review recommended to assess actual risk.

classifications.impact: Complete browsing behavior exposed for profiling and tracking

recommendation.rationale: Extension accesses 1 type(s) of sensitive personal data. Requires immediate investigation and likely removal.
next_steps: Check network logs for data exfiltration

threat_attribution.extension_name: Ad Speedup - Skip Video Ads 16X Faster
threat_attribution.osint_summary:
## OSINT Analysis - NO ATTRIBUTION FOUND

**Extension Identified:** Ad Speedup - Skip Video Ads 16X Faster (ID: pcjlckhhhmlefmobnnoolakplfppdchi)

**Database Check:** Not in known malicious extensions database
**Pattern Matching:** No known campaign patterns matched
**Web Search:** No relevant mentions found

**Recommendation:**
No threat attribution found. This does not confirm the extension is safe -
it may simply be a new or lesser-known threat. Continue with static/dynamic analysis.

threat_classification.summary: Critical threat pattern detected (CREDENTIAL_STEALER). Extension exhibits capabilities consistent with malware.
